name: deploy_web_file
description: Deploys a web file (HTML, JS, CSS) to the PASOE web root at C:\projects\mcp\mcp\web\. Takes filename and file_content and writes the file to the PASOE web directory, making it immediately accessible via the PASOE HTTP server.

filename.description: The filename to write, e.g. pasoe_access_log.html

file_content.description: The full text content of the file to write

subfolder.description: Optional subfolder under the web root, e.g. 'tools'. Leave empty for web root.
